headline: Fixed the mobile overlap where photo grids covered the start/how-to text section.
focus: Separate photo grids and guide/start sections on mobile so text no longer sits on top of images.
notes: Forced start/how-to sections to clear below image grids.
Added safer z-index and spacing for guide cards below photo collages.
Softened the '시작하는 법' copy into a more natural travel-entry phrase.
